name: Perdoceo Education Corporation
description: Perdoceo Education Corporation is a provider of postsecondary education, offering a range of online, campus-based, and blended learning programs. The company owns and operates several for-profit universities in the United States, including American Intercontinental University, Colorado Technical University, and the University of St. Augustine for Health Sciences. Committed to quality academic outcomes, Perdoceo focuses on serving a diverse student population through its various institutions, providing educational services designed to support career opportunities and professional development for students across multiple disciplines and fields of study.
